feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Total for GL accounts in SAC TB=B/S + I/S flat structure
entry.content: Hi all, I am looking for some help on SAC. I need to create a total on a story for GL accounts on a flat structure. TB total = B/S (GL series 10000000 to 39999999) + P/L ( GL Series 40000000 - 99999999).

entry.title: data action to copy data by version and date from classic model to new model
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a data action to copy data from classic model (Revenue) to new model (Revenue_Test)  by date & version.

See attached script but it contains many errors.

I am new to scripting so would appreciate help to get this data action working.

Thanks,

Rajash

entry.title: limitations of SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) when it comes to compare SAP BO Webi
entry.content:
I have a few questions regarding the limitations of SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) when it comes to replicating Webi Trellis  vertical /horizontal Tables.

1) Does SAC support cell level calculations similar to the structure in Webi?
2) What functions in Webi, such as force merge merge dimension  and where etc , have equivalent functions in SAC, and what are those replacements?
3) Does SAC support publication formats like PDF, HTML, and Excel?

entry.title: (Datasphere/SAC) Time Dimension attributes not visible in SAC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created an analytical model in Datasphere (DSP). In the underlying fact view, I have created a handful of associations, including an association with the time dimension table created for the space.

Enabling all of the attributes in the DSP Analytical model allows me to see and use them in the Analytical model Preview, SAC Data Analyzer, and in a Table Widget in a SAC story.

But alas! I need them in a chart, where they are not visible. Only the hierarchy I created in the time dimension is available when adding the time dimension to the chart.

entry.title: How to Link a Public Dimension to another dimension in a model.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve created a Public Dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud and would like to link it to a dimension in another model (e.g., linking Customer_ID in my model to the public dimension).

How can I do this properly? Are there any specific steps or requirements I should follow?

Any tips or documentation links would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks,
Huzaifa

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Live Connection Error to S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to create live connection between our S/4HANA Cloud ERP and SAC systems. Although we have tracked the steps in below help document, we got "We couldn't connect to your S/4 HANA system. " error message with log "Live Data connection .... does not exist".  WE couldn't find the missing part, can you help us on that?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Blank page when logging into Excel with the SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud) plugin
entry.content:
Hello, good morning. I'm trying to test the SAC plugin with Excel, but when I log in, it loads the login page, but the page remains blank.
I've followed ALL the suggestions I've found, but nothing. I've already configured trusted sources and cleared cookies, but still nothing. Has anyone managed to resolve this?

entry.title: I want to create a button that will sort a dimension in a table by the highest to lowest value
entry.content:
I want to create a button that will sort a table with a list of countries highest to lowest by sales. 

Anyone any idea how to achieve this. I have tried ChatGPT but the solutions it is providing are not working.

 

Thanks

 

SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics #Script

entry.title: Recover the original version of the standard content after it was overwritten in SAP
entry.content:
Dear All, 

 

There is standard IFP business content available in the public folder of SAP SAC . I had reimported this content, but I selected the 'Import' option with overwrite enabled, which replaced the existing content. Now, I want to retrieve the previous version. How can I recover the original content in which I have made changes

entry.title: Knowledge sharing - SAP Multi-Client setup and experiences using SAC/Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi all you SAP gurus, 

Does anyone know of companies running a SAP muli-client setup combined with SAC and Datashere?

If yes, how did they accomplish the setup on SAS/SAP Datasphere side etc. in relation to spaces,  joint corporate reporting and so on?

Any comments are welcome 🙂

Thanks in advance,

Michael

May the SAP force be with you all ....

entry.title: Display Time Series Data in SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a large data set of time series data (machine data) that I would like to display in SAC. I don't want to aggregate the values, just visualize them.

The columns are basically timestamp (DD.MM.YYYY hh:mm:ss) and value

I tried a line chart with the flat presentation of the timestamp as dimension and value as the measure. It basically gives me what I need except for the limitation of only 500 displayed values, that I cannot remove like you can in a table. 

So then I tried the time series chart with same dimension and measure, but on the x-axis only the date is displayed with all values that have been recorded on this date on top of each other. 

So is there a way to either remove the limit to the line chart or actually display the whole timestamp in a time series chart?

Thank you for your ideas

Regards

Maike
line:

time series:

entry.title: How to update a Role's model level privacy restrictions in SAC using an API
entry.content:
Hi Experts, we are looking into automating SAC Security. 

SAC tool provides import of users, so we can accommodate the new users, or updates to existing users to certain extent. 

Similarly, if we get import of teams updates, that would be great. Is there a way we can do this through an API, using a file upload, etc.

Also, if Role's model level privacy restrictions in SAC can be updated using an API, then all the aspects can be fully automated. 

Thanks & Best Regards,

SP

entry.title: SAC Dashboard 'Variance %' Threshold values color should appear on 'Actual' Value
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement of Bar chart with Actual,  plan and variance %.

In the SAC  Dashboard, the 'Variance %' threshold color is intended to appear on the 'Actual' value, not on the variance itself.

Variance in threshold values which changes the color dynamically based on % values.

GE = 0  'Green'

 0 to -0.2 ' yellow'

Less then -0.2 ' Red's

As shown in the below Pic.  'Ava Power Variance' threshold color should appear same color on 'Availability Power - AYTD%'.

Please suggest how we can change the 'Actual' color dynamically based on  "Variance %'  Threshold Colors.  

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud planning - Data action issue
entry.content:
Hi, I’m facing an issue with a Data Action where users select a start and end time period to perform employee transfers. However, the Data Action is currently running even on closed periods—meaning the actual periods—where I don’t want the new data to appear. The problem is that I’m scoping the time dimension based on user-selected parameters rather than using version properties, so the Data Action affects both actual and planning periods indiscriminately.

To solve this, I need a way to restrict the Data Action so that it only updates data for planning periods within the user’s selected range and completely excludes any actual (closed) periods, even if they fall between the start and end dates. For example, if the user selects January to June 2025, but January to March 2025 are actual periods, the Data Action should only process April to June 2025, leaving the actual periods untouched.  i have locked data at model level but i dont want to show the user any data movements on actual periods. Can anyone please help.

@N1kh1l 

Regards,

Lakshmi

entry.title: OTP based login in SAC dashboard
entry.content:
Hii community,

I am trying to create an OTP based login in my SAC dashboard where i will be able to see my SAC dashboards based on provided OTP and after clicking submit button i will be navigated to my dashboards with proper data filtered based on the OTP used.  Does anyone have any idea on how to achieve this.

entry.title: Unable to get the desired data from REST API to SAC
entry.content:
I have a REST API in SuccessFactors and I need to consume its data in a SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). I have successfully created a import connection, but when trying to import the data, I am unable to see the desired data (employee compensation). I can see the data in POSTMAN. 

Please help me to fix this issue.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: How do I build dynamic “Current-Year vs. Prior-Year” KPIs
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m building a dashboard in SAP Analytics Cloud – Analytics Designer where the user enters a year (e.g. 2025) and the app should immediately show:

  • Bruttogewicht Lieferung (current year)
  • Bruttogewicht Lieferung (prior year)
  • Bruttogewicht Lieferung (prior-prior year)
  • an automatic %-deviation between current year and prior year (Numerical Point widget)

It means, that the user can input the current year in the input field, our script calculates the prior and prior-prior year and gives us the results. 

What I already have:
An InputField for the year

  • A Numeric Point (Chart_4) with two feeds
  • ValueAxis → Primary value
  • ValueAxis2 → Comparison value

  •  

  • Working script that filters all charts to the three selected years:
ds.setDimensionFilter("BDATU_JAHR", { values: [year, year-1, year-2] });

Script that removes all measures from the Numeric Point and adds two IDs:

chart.addMeasure("ValueAxis", "BG_2025"); chart.addMeasure("ValueAxis2", "BG_2024");

–> works fine if the Restricted Measures BG_2025, BG_2024, … already exist.

Pain point:
I don’t want to create a new Restricted Measure every single year manually. I had the following idea: 

Have three reusable Restricted Measures (current year, prior, prior-prior). Change their year filter (value in the dimension, used for the restriction) dynamically in script or swap them in/out without maintaining dozens of hard-coded IDs? My question is: Can I simply create 3 restricted measures: current year, prior year and prior-prior year and just change the dimension-value (2025, 2024, 2023 and so on), using scripting? 

My code, that I have created so far looks like that. Here I just works with different restricted measures for each year, that I created manually. I do not want 2025, 2024, 2023, but rather: : current year, prior year and prior-prior year, which 'filters' (years) will be changed dynamically.

/* ───────── 1. Wert aus dem Eingabefeld holen ───────── */
var actualYear = InputField_1.getValue();
var current_date = new Date().getFullYear();

// Zeichenfolge in das Datum konvertieren
var yearNum = ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(actualYear);

if (yearNum >= 1931 && yearNum <= current_date) {
	// Aktuelles, -Vor und -Vorvorjahr berechnen
	VariableAktualYear = yearNum;
	VariablePastYear = yearNum - 1;
	VariablePastPastYear = yearNum - 2;	
	
	var msg_1 = VariableAktualYear.toString();                           
	var msg_2 = VariablePastYear.toString();
	var msg_3 = VariablePastPastYear.toString();
	
	/* Daten quelle des Charts holen und den modifizieren */
	var ds = Chart_1.getDataSource();

	ds.setDimensionFilter("BDATU_JAHR", {values: [msg_1, msg_2, msg_3]});

	
	/* ───────── 2. Measures tauschen ───────── */
	//var measAct  = "BG_" + msg_1;       
	//var measPrev = "BG_" + msg_2;
	//Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, measAct);
	//Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, measPrev);
 
	// 23735103-3540-4518-3856-333700453218 - Jahr 2025
	// 42543347-2523-4283-3882-314686436141 - jahr 2024 
	// 32937114-7011-4110-3663-482995517414 - Jahr 2023
	// 29229304-1622-4153-3546-241342908683 - Jahr 2022
	
	var idMap = {
	  2025 : "23735103-3540-4518-3856-333700453218",
	  2024 : "42543347-2523-4283-3882-314686436141",
	  2023 : "32937114-7011-4110-3663-482995517414",
	  2022 : "29229304-1622-4153-3546-241342908683"
	};
	
	var measAct = idMap[msg_1];
	var measPrev = idMap[msg_2];
		

	var chart = Chart_4;
	var measures = Chart_4.getMeasures(Feed.ValueAxis);
	
	for (var i = 0; i < measures.length; i++) {
		chart.removeMeasure(measures[i], Feed.ValueAxis);
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Removed: ' + measures[i]);
	}
	
	Chart_4.addMeasure(measAct, Feed.ValueAxis);
	Chart_4.addMeasure(measPrev, Feed.ValueAxis);

	
	/* ───────── 2. Measures tauschen ───────── */

	
	// Check
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Aktuelles Jahr: '+ msg_1);
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Vorjahr: '+ msg_2);
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Vorvorjahr: '+ msg_3);
	
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Success,
        'Jahr ' + actualYear + ' übernommen.');

} else {
	var msg_4 = current_date.toString();
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error, 'Bitte eine vierstellige Jahreszahl (1931–' + msg_4 + ')');

I hope, you could help me with this issue.

entry.title: [SAC] - How to set the Story filter's active members?
entry.content:
As far as I know, there is a method called `setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy` that can control the members of a story filter. However, the effect I want is that when we enter a SAC page, the number of members in a story filter remains unchanged, but the selected values change. It seems to me that this cannot be achieved through scripting. Does anyone have any ideas?

Example:
By default, all options in the story filter (Fiscal Year Period) are selected:

When we enter a SAC page, the script can set it to look like the image below, with only 2009002 and 2010002 selected:

The above is the result I hope to achieve.

However, I found that only the `setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy` method can control changes to the Story Filter, and the result of this change is as shown below. But this result is not what I want because the other members are missing:

So my questions are:
1. Besides `setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy`, are there other methods to set the values of a story filter?
2. Is there any other way to achieve the effect I want?

entry.title: Unsupported and won't be available: No Linked Dimension is use for Blended Visualization
entry.content:
Is there a specific reason as to why this specific functionality won't be available in ODE? 

We have several dashboards still running in classic just because we can visualize unlinked dimensions in blended models.

Among the many developments done in ODE, this is a serious step back.

Is there a workaround when working with SAP BW live models?

entry.title: Variance to previous year on a year-to-date line chart compares current month fully not partially
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I got some revenue data on daily level that I show monthly aggregated in a line chart filtered on Year-to-date.

I enabled varance to see difference / Year-over-Year comparison. Working fine in general except for the current month.

There the variance is comparing to "complete month" of the previous year instead of the to-date time intervall of that month.  My expectation would be that when running story today the variance would compare 06/01/2025 ... 06/17/2025   to 06/01/2024 ... 06/17/2024 time intervals for the current month.

Do I do something wrong? 

Thanks and best regards
Axel
